data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when form version changes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of re-signing when the form version changes, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this requirement in the current saga run. The prior steps do not address this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive status regarding its validation.
gaps: Re-sign requirement when form version changes is not implemented or validated.
